channel.title: GNfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Global oil prices top $111 a barrel after reports that Trump is unhappy with Iran’s proposal to end war
item.description: Brent crude futures for June delivery climbed to above $111 a barrel as the endpoint of the U.S.-Iran conflict remains unclear.

item.title: Could a jet-fuel shortage turn your European summer vacation into a nightmare?
item.description: Jet-fuel prices in Europe are among the most emblematic effects of the U.S.-Israel war with Iran and the disruptions the conflict has caused in energy...

item.title: How to spot the silent fees and hidden costs your adviser isn’t mentioning
item.description: From revenue-sharing ‘kickbacks’ to advisory fees on idle cash, here are the two questions you need to ask to protect your returns.

item.title: What Paul Tudor Jones is warning us against doing as the S&P 500 hits record heights
item.description: Jones is concerned about excess leverage in the system, about the S&P valuations and a deluge of equity supply but he does sense an opportunity in Jap...
